Package neqsim.process.safety.inventory

Class TrappedInventoryCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.inventory.TrappedInventoryCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TrappedInventoryCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Calculates trapped inventory for a documented isolation envelope.

The calculator is intended for technical safety studies where P&ID, line-list, stress isometric, datasheet, or STID evidence defines the isolated equipment and piping volume. It combines those volumes with a NeqSim fluid state to estimate gas and optional liquid inventory before blowdown, relief, flare-load, or MDMT calculations.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setFluid

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Sets the representative fluid for all inventory segments.
      Parameters:
      fluid - representative fluid with components and mixing rule configured
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the fluid is null

    • setOperatingConditions

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator setOperatingConditions(double pressure, String pressureUnit, double temperature, String temperatureUnit)
      Sets operating pressure and temperature for the trapped inventory.
      Parameters:
      pressure - pressure value in the supplied pressure unit; must be positive
      pressureUnit - pressure unit supported by PressureUnit, for example bara or barg
      temperature - temperature value in the supplied temperature unit
      temperatureUnit - temperature unit supported by TemperatureUnit, for example K or C
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pressure or temperature is non-physical

    • setOperatingConditions

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator setOperatingConditions(double pressureBara, double temperatureK)
      Sets operating pressure in bara and temperature in K.
      Parameters:
      pressureBara - absolute pressure in bara; must be positive
      temperatureK - absolute temperature in K; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if pressure or temperature is non-physical

    • setFallbackLiquidDensity

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator setFallbackLiquidDensity(double densityKgPerM3)
      Sets fallback liquid density used when no liquid phase is present in the representative fluid.
      Parameters:
      densityKgPerM3 - fallback liquid density in kg/m3; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if density is non-positive

    • addEquipmentVolume

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator addEquipmentVolume(String equipmentTag, double volumeM3, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
      Adds a documented equipment or vessel volume.
      Parameters:
      equipmentTag - equipment tag or segment identifier
      volumeM3 - internal volume in m3; must be positive
      liquidFillFraction - liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1
      evidence - optional traceable document evidence; may be null
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if segment values are invalid

    • addVolumeSegment

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator addVolumeSegment(String segmentId, double volume, String volumeUnit, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
      Adds a documented volume segment using an engineering volume unit.
      Parameters:
      segmentId - segment identifier
      volume - volume value in the supplied unit; must be positive
      volumeUnit - volume unit, for example m3, L, litre, ft3, or bbl
      liquidFillFraction - liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1
      evidence - optional traceable document evidence; may be null
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if segment values are invalid

    • addPipeSegment

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator addPipeSegment(String segmentId, double internalDiameterM, double lengthM, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
      Adds a documented pipe segment from diameter and length.
      Parameters:
      segmentId - pipe segment identifier
      internalDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in m; must be positive
      lengthM - pipe length in m; must be positive
      liquidFillFraction - liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1
      evidence - optional traceable document evidence; may be null
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if segment values are invalid

    • addPipeSegment

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator addPipeSegment(String segmentId, double internalDiameter, String diameterUnit, double length, String lengthUnit, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
      Adds a documented pipe segment from diameter and length in engineering units.
      Parameters:
      segmentId - pipe segment identifier
      internalDiameter - pipe internal diameter in the supplied diameter unit
      diameterUnit - diameter unit, for example m, mm, in, or ft
      length - pipe length in the supplied length unit
      lengthUnit - length unit, for example m, mm, in, or ft
      liquidFillFraction - liquid fill fraction from 0 to 1
      evidence - optional traceable document evidence; may be null
      Returns:
      this calculator for chained setup
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if segment values are invalid

    • calculate

      public TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult calculate()
      Calculates trapped gas and liquid inventory for all configured segments.
      Returns:
      calculated inventory result
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if required setup is missing

    • createDepressurizationFluid

      public SystemInterface createDepressurizationFluid()
      Creates a lumped gas fluid suitable for DepressurizationSimulator input.

      The returned fluid is set to the calculated gas inventory because liquid holdup in blocked-in piping usually does not discharge as gas through the blowdown valve. Liquid inventory remains available in TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult for KO-drum and cold-temperature screening.

      Returns:
      cloned fluid with total moles set from calculated gas mass
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the calculated mass or molar mass is non-positive

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Converts the current inventory calculation to pretty JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the calculated inventory

    • validateSetup

      private void validateSetup()
      Checks that all required inputs are present and valid.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if a required input is missing

    • prepareFluidState

      private SystemInterface prepareFluidState()
      Creates a flashed clone of the representative fluid at operating conditions.
      Returns:
      cloned and flashed fluid state

    • getGasDensity

      private double getGasDensity(SystemInterface stateFluid)
      Reads gas density from a flashed fluid state.
      Parameters:
      stateFluid - flashed fluid state
      Returns:
      gas density in kg/m3, or bulk density when no gas phase exists

    • getLiquidDensity

      private double getLiquidDensity(SystemInterface stateFluid)
      Reads liquid density from a flashed fluid state.
      Parameters:
      stateFluid - flashed fluid state
      Returns:
      liquid density in kg/m3, or fallback density when no liquid phase exists

    • validatePositive

      private static void validatePositive(double value, String name)
      Validates that a positive value was provided.
      Parameters:
      value - value to validate
      name - parameter name used in exception messages
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is not positive and finite

      private static double toMeters(double value, String unit)
      Converts a length value to meters.
      Parameters:
      value - length value in the supplied unit
      unit - length unit
      Returns:
      length in m
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the unit is unsupported

    • toCubicMeters

      private static double toCubicMeters(double value, String unit)
      Converts a volume value to cubic meters.
      Parameters:
      value - volume value in the supplied unit
      unit - volume unit
      Returns:
      volume in m3
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the unit is unsupported

    • normalizeUnit

      private static String normalizeUnit(String unit)
      Normalizes a unit string for comparison.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit string to normalize
      Returns:
      trimmed lower-case unit string
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the unit is empty
